title: ilex montana var. beadlei
intro: Ilex montana var. beadlei, also known as the Beadle's holly, is a variety of the Ilex montana plant, a species of holly native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ilex montana var. beadlei include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract issues, fever reduction, and as a natural remedy for rheumatism. Ilex montana var. beadlei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a medical professional.
